summary: Comprehensive payment flow testing for Miro.Care Stripe integration. All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests verified tariff page with 4 cards, test tariff activation with redirect to chat, and paid tariff redirect to Stripe checkout.

minor.issue: Stripe get_checkout_status returns 404 for test sessions - backend handles gracefully with DB fallback
minor.note: Expected behavior with sk_test_emergent test key

critical_code_review_comments: Payment flow implementation is solid with proper error handling
Graceful fallback when Stripe API errors - returns DB status
Webhook handler processes checkout.session.completed events correctly
Frontend PaymentSuccess page has 5 states: checking/paid/expired/timeout/error
seed_data_creation: Guest users created during tests for isolation

mocked_apis.stripe: MOCKED - Uses sk_test_emergent test key. Checkout sessions are created and redirect to real Stripe checkout page, but get_checkout_status returns 404 for test sessions. Backend handles this gracefully with DB fallback.
mocked_apis.webhook_signature: MOCKED - Webhook signature verification may not work end-to-end with test key

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 focused on payment flow testing. All 15 requested features verified: (1-2) Test tariff immediate activation and 'already used' error; (3-5) Hour/week/month tariffs return Stripe checkout URLs; (6) Invalid tariff returns 400; (7-8) Payment status polling with graceful fallback and 404 for non-existent; (9) Webhook endpoint responds; (10) Transaction records created in MongoDB; (11) Idempotent activation; (12-15) Frontend tariff page shows 4 cards, test tariff redirects to chat, paid tariffs redirect to Stripe checkout, PaymentSuccess page polls status.

features_tested.1_test_tariff_activation: PASS - Immediate activation, sets test_used=true, minutes_left=3
features_tested.3_hour_tariff_stripe_url: PASS - Returns Stripe checkout URL and session_id
features_tested.4_week_tariff_stripe_url: PASS - Returns Stripe checkout URL and session_id
features_tested.5_month_tariff_stripe_url: PASS - Returns Stripe checkout URL and session_id
features_tested.10_transaction_records: PASS - Created in MongoDB with correct fields
features_tested.11_idempotent_activation: PASS - Multiple status checks don't double-activate
features_tested.12_frontend_tariff_page: PASS - Shows 4 tariff cards (test, hour, week, month)
features_tested.14_frontend_paid_tariff_click: PASS - Redirects to Stripe checkout URL
features_tested.15_frontend_payment_success: PASS - Polls /api/payments/status and shows appropriate states
